name: @beamhop/acp-protocol
description: Shared wire-protocol types and envelopes for bridging ACP coding-agent CLIs to browsers over WebSocket.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external '@zed-industries/agent-client-protocol' && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' --external '@zed-industries/agent-client-protocol' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
